status: draft — 5 of 14 live products. Remaining 9 handled via Coming Soon ticket.

products.name: ACV & Ginger Gummies

description.short: Support gut health and metabolism with the power of Apple Cider Vinegar.

ingredients.active: Apple Cider Vinegar (with Mother) 500mg; Ginger Extract 10mg (per 2 gummies)
ingredients.other: Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Water, Pre-mix (Ginger Extract, Mother Apple Cider Vinegar), Pectin, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Anthocyanadins, Sodium Copper Chlorophyll, Coconut Oil, Carnauba Wax, Apple Flavour
ingredients.full: Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Water, Pre-mix (Ginger Extract, Mother Apple Cider Vinegar), Pectin, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Anthocyanadins, Sodium Copper Chlorophyll, Coconut Oil, Carnauba Wax, Apple Flavour

products.allergens: Manufactured in a facility that handles allergy-based materials
products.contraindications: Consult health practitioner if taking medication or under medical supervision

products.name: Vitamin D3 4000 IU Gummies

description.short: High-strength Vitamin D3 to support immune health and bone strength.

ingredients.other: Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Water, Pectin (Gelling Agent), Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Coconut Oil, Carnauba Wax, Natural Orange Flavour, Paprika Extract (Natural colouring)
ingredients.full: Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Water, Pectin (Gelling Agent), Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Colecalciferol, Coconut Oil, Carnauba Wax, Natural Orange Flavour, Paprika Extract (Natural colouring)

products.allergens: Manufactured in a facility that handles allergy-based materials
products.contraindications: Consult health practitioner if taking medication or under medical supervision

products.name: Probiotic + Vitamin Mix

description.short: A multi-strain probiotic blend to balance your gut microbiome.

ingredients.active: Active Live Culture Blend 10 Billion CFU/cap (Bifidobacterium lactis, B. bifidum, B. longum, Lactobacillus acidophilus, L. casei rhamnosus, Streptococcus thermophilus); FOS 40mg/cap
ingredients.other: Brown Rice Flour (Bulking), Capsule Shell (Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Gellan Gum), Chicory Inulin (FOS), Magnesium Stearate (Anti-caking)
ingredients.full: Bulking Agent: Brown Rice Flour; Capsule Shell: Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Gellan Gum; Active Live Culture Blend (6 strains); Chicory Inulin (Fructooligosaccharides); Anti-Caking Agent: Magnesium Stearate

products.allergens: Manufactured in a facility that handles allergy-based materials
products.contraindications: Do not swallow with hot drinks. Consult health practitioner if taking medication or under medical supervision

products.name: Ashwagandha Gummies

description.short: Natural stress relief and cognitive support in delicious gummy form.

ingredients.active: KSM-66 Ashwagandha Root Extract 500mg/cap (equivalent to 6250mg Ashwagandha root, ~12.5:1 ratio)
ingredients.other: Rice Bran, Capsule Shell: Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose
ingredients.full: KSM-66 Ashwagandha Root Extract, Rice Bran, Capsule Shell (Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose)

products.allergens: Manufactured in a facility that handles allergy-based materials
products.contraindications: Not recommended for children, pregnant or lactating women. Consult health practitioner if taking medication.

products.name: Magnesium Gummies

description.short: Support muscle function and relaxation with our tasty magnesium gummies.

ingredients.active: Magnesium 375mg (100% NRV) per 3 caps — as Bisglycinate 180mg + Malate 165mg + Taurate 30mg; Vitamin B6 1.4mg (100% NRV)
ingredients.other: Magnesium Malate, Magnesium Bisglycinate (buffered), Capsule Shell (HPMC), Magnesium Taurine Chelate (buffered), Microcrystalline Cellulose (Bulking), Magnesium Stearate, Silicon Dioxide (Anti-caking), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (B6)
ingredients.full: Magnesium Malate, Magnesium Bisglycinate (buffered), Capsule Shell: Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Magnesium Taurine Chelate (buffered), Bulking Agent (Microcrystalline Cellulose), Anti-caking Agents (Magnesium Stearate, Silicon Dioxide), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6)

products.allergens: Manufactured in a facility that handles allergy-based materials

suitability.vegan_note: Not explicitly declared on supplier doc — verification pending

products.contraindications: Not recommended for children, pregnant or lactating women. Consult health practitioner if taking medication.

open_decisions.sku_scheme: Placeholder = slug. Final scheme TBD (proposal: HEA-[FORMAT]-[INGREDIENT]-[SIZE]).
